build.prompt: Run the gradle build for Lumigram. Build command: ./gradlew assembleDebug. Only build arm64-v8a (abi split in app/build.gradle). Targets: TMessagesProj_App:assembleDebug. Do NOT run lint or test tasks unless asked. If build fails, analyze the error and fix it before retrying.
Run ./gradlew assembleDebug to build Lumigram APK. Only arm64-v8a is included per app build.gradle config.

test.prompt: Run ./gradlew :TMessagesProj_AppTests:testDebugUnitTest to execute plugin unit tests.

rebuild-native.prompt: Run ./gradlew :TMessagesProj:externalNativeBuildDebug to rebuild only the native .so libraries (CMake).
